user_query: I want to surprise my family with a vacation in Europe. Can you help me calculate the exchange rate from USD to EUR for an amount of 2000? Also, provide me with the fear and greed index for today and the top NFT collections ranked by volume and sales.

TaskList.description: Calculate the current exchange rate from USD to EUR for an amount of 2000.
Retrieve the current fear and greed index for today.
Fetch the top NFT collections ranked by volume and sales.
